title: The Bamboo Saucer
writer: Frank Telford, Alford Van Ronkel, John P. Fulton
actors: Dan Duryea, John Ericson, Lois Nettleton
plot: A flying saucer hidden in a Red Chinese peasant village is sought by teams from the United States and U.S.S.R. On finding it, they band together to explore the saucer and take a trip into space.
